description: Composition Purple, white and navy blue striped polo T-shirt for women made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, has a ribbed spread collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, nike swoosh embroidered on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations A summer staple from nike for the urban woman, this piece is sure to become an off-duty favourite in your fashion focused sportswear collection. Crafted for sport and fashioned to look great, Nike gets it right with this versatile piece. Style this with sport shoes and track pants when you're out for an early morning run, or with your favourite jeans and slip-on shoes for a casual look.
